function.name: generate_multimodal_report
function.description: Analyze and integrate information from multiple modalities (text, image, video, audio) to create a unified, structured English report. The output should summarize key findings, highlight important details, and present them in a logically organized format. For example, if the query is 'Generate a report about the environmental impact of this river from provided video and text data', the function should extract insights from both video and text, then merge them into a coherent report.

query.description: Free-text user query describing the content or topic for which the report should be generated (e.g., 'Analyze and summarize the security issues from this CCTV footage and transcript').
